title: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
feature: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Verify that the Software Update tab persistently shows Charge Stand info after placing a turned-on headset on the stand, through removal, device restart, and app restart.
steps: Place a turned-on headset on the charge stand.
Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
Verify that the Software Update tab displays information about the Charge Stand.
Remove the headset from the charge stand.
Navigate again to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
Verify that the Charge Stand information still persists.
expected: The Device Settings > Software Update tab displays information about the Charge Stand, and this info persists after removing the headset from the stand, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
